coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is likely about whether Lin’s post-launch late nights reflect a sustainable Head of Product workload or a delegation and priority problem.
openingQuestion: What is still pulling you into late nights now that the launches are behind you, and what feels like work only you can carry right now?
listenFor: whether he names a specific recurring task, decision stream, or stakeholder that keeps extending his day
whether he downplays the pattern without giving a concrete time-bound reason it should taper off
if they can clearly separate work that needs Head of Product judgment from work that could sit with PMs or partners
avoid: do not frame the late nights as proof that Lin is managing his role poorly
do not jump into solving capacity before you hear what commitments, interrupts, and ownership he is actually carrying
goodOutcome: You and Lin have agreed one concrete split between Head of Product work he should keep owning and one meaningful area of product ownership he should delegate.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example of work Lin personally drove after launch and ask yourself whether it truly required Head of Product authority or could have been owned lower down.
